Sitio Cagbolo, Brgy. Conalum, Inopacan Leyte

4th Quarter Exam in MAPEH 4

Name:
Music & Arts
Direction: Encircle the correct answer.
An event that is usually staged by a local community which centers on a theme or a unique aspect of the community, often honoring a patron saint.
a. Day of dead     b. Aurora mass     c. Fiesta

Which festival is famous for colorful masks in the Philippines?
a. Pahiyas Festival
b. MassKara Festival
c. Panagbenga Festival

P.E & HEALTH
I. Direction: Encircle the correct answer.
What is a basic health right?
a. The right to play video games
b. The right to access healthcare and live a healthy life
c. The right to sleep all day

Read each situation carefully. Write the correct consumer right from the list below that matches the situation.
Right to Information
Right to Safety
Right to Redress
Right to Representation
Right to Basic Needs
Right to Consumer Education
Right to Choose
